text: `curl http://localhost:8080/` gives connection refused — nothing is listening there. List what IS listening: `sudo ss -tlnp` (or `ss -tln`).
`ss -tlnp` shows nginx listening on `:9090`, not `:8080`. Its config has the wrong port. Find it: `grep -rn listen /etc/nginx/`.
Edit the `listen 9090;` in `/etc/nginx/conf.d/app.conf` to `listen 8080;`, then apply it without downtime: `sudo nginx -t && sudo nginx -s reload`. Re-test `curl http://localhost:8080/`.
